summary: Implemented ADR 0231 from a latest-origin/main worktree by replacing the control-plane backup's on-disk OpenBao token and baked-in Windmill DSN with an OpenBao Agent plus systemd-credentials delivery path, then replayed the live control-plane recovery workflow and re-verified the fresh backup set plus restore drill.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest pytest -q tests/test_compose_runtime_secret_injection.py` returned `12 passed in 0.10s` after covering the new host-native secret helper, the control-plane backup script, and the systemd credential wiring.

verification.check: Control-plane recovery playbook syntax and role wiring
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-control-plane-recovery` completed successfully after the helper switched to the direct `/bin/vault` container entrypoint and integer sink/template permission bits.

`make converge-control-plane-recovery` completed successfully from the isolated latest-main worktree, re-converging `proxmox-host`, `docker-runtime-lv3`, and `backup-lv3` with `ok=5 changed=0 failed=0`, `ok=45 changed=7 failed=0`, and `ok=38 changed=8 failed=0` respectively.

`lv3-control-plane-backup-openbao-agent.service` is active on `docker-runtime-lv3`, its journal shows `token written: path=/run/lv3-systemd-credentials/control-plane-backup/openbao-token`, and both `/run/lv3-systemd-credentials/control-plane-backup/openbao-token` and `/run/lv3-systemd-credentials/control-plane-backup/windmill-db-dsn` exist at mode `0600` with non-zero size while `/etc/lv3/control-plane-recovery/openbao-backup-token.json` is absent.

verification.check: Immediate backup replay through systemd credentials
verification.observed: `lv3-control-plane-backup.service` finished successfully at `2026-03-28 16:44:35 UTC` after starting at `2026-03-28 16:44:31 UTC`, and the live unit now depends on `lv3-control-plane-backup-openbao-agent.service` and loads `openbao-token` plus `windmill-db-dsn` via `LoadCredential=`.

verification.check: Fresh backup generation and restore drill
verification.observed: `backup-lv3` now exposes fresh runtime generation `/srv/control-plane-recovery/runtime/docker-runtime-lv3/20260328T164431Z` with updated `windmill-db.dump`, `windmill-files.tar.zst`, `mail-platform.tar.zst`, `step-ca.tar.zst`, `openbao-config.tar.zst`, `openbao-raft.snap`, and `control-plane-backup-manifest.json`, and `/srv/control-plane-recovery/drills/last-restore-drill.json` recorded `checked_at: 2026-03-28T16:45:06Z` with `result: pass`.

notes: The first live replay attempts surfaced two host-side integration bugs in the new helper: the OpenBao container image had to bypass its default entrypoint and run `/bin/vault` directly, and the agent HCL needed integer permission bits instead of quoted mode strings for the file sink and rendered template.

This receipt supersedes the older plaintext-token delivery model for the `control_plane_recovery` capability while intentionally deferring the protected integration files to the later merge-to-main step.
